nodes.name: Jobber Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives Jobber App webhook events. Configure in Jobber > App Center > Webhooks. Events: job_created, job_updated, job_completed, job_cancelled, client_created, invoice_created, payment_received, visit_completed, quote_created, quote_approved

nodes.name: Normalize Jobber Event
nodes.notes: Maps Jobber job/client/quote/invoice events to GL365 journal format.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: =[{"role":"user","content":"Write ONE concise sentence for a service business CRM journal entry. Include names, job details, amounts where available. Jobber event: {{$json.event_type}}. Customer: {{$json.contact_name}}. Job: {{$json.job_title}}. Address: {{$json.job_address}}. Total: {{$json.job_total}}. Assigned to: {{$json.assigned_to}}."}]
